benefits.description: Achieves significant tan; able to avoid or minimize burning with 2-3 tanning sessions per week during loading, maintained with 1x per week tanning

Strong erection upon waking when taken before bed, described as comparable to viagra/cialis; erection persistent and does not want to go down; able to achieve another round quickly after orgasm; effects last majority of the day
Very slight appetite suppression, described as nothing crazy

side_effects.description: Nausea for about 30 minutes post injection
Face flushing for about 30 minutes post injection
Darkens existing beauty marks/moles; may bring out previously unseen ones

protocol_notes: 15 years of on/off use. Loading protocol: 0.5mg daily with 2-3 tanning sessions per week until desired tan reached. Maintenance protocol: 0.5mg 2x per week with 1x per week tanning session.
